content: i honestly don't get what's the point of the story order if you need reality verges to unlock the psyche deepdives that will take you weeks to unlock
it just makes wanting to experience the story more tedious?
unless im missing another way to unlock reality verges

I would only use it as a reference for where in the main story the side stories take place, not when you should stop the main story to read them (and even then a few of them are in the wrong spot, like Salvador's that clearly takes place after chapter 6)
yeah lol i realised Salvadors is supposed to be done later on a bit too late
what Mirror said, except for maybe Sorel and Gramona’s who introduce pretty important elements into the plot
but i still think it's a dumb mechanic to keep in game, considering how the story keeps progressing and at one point it'll be too difficult to read all of them
yeah, was typing that myself, Ramona: Timeworn's deepdive sets up some plot stuff that becomes relevant in chapter 7, and Sorel's Special Op introduces an important character that also appears in Ch7
you guys don't think they should be reworked or imo removed?
at least an increase in the amount you gain daily or something on that note
i know you can unlock them for free during their events but that's just unfriendly to new players, and considering the devs aim to expand their numbers it's against their objective

should maybe be sped up a bit, I don't really mind them unlocking over time, but it does feel limiting. Discussing it here isn't going to change anything though, devs don't read this channel for feedback. You can make a suggestion thread over in the QA channel though if you feel strongly about it
personally i skip all the story stuff for now but i’ll go back and watch it in story mode when i have time
i see, thanks for letting me now
id rather watch a movie than experience it all over the course of months
I'll try to word it better as a proposal and hopefully they'll take it into consideration
i think you would miss a few important interactions
but I'm not sure how the story only works
the plot segments during explorations
idk either
I pay attention when Agrippa is on screen otherwise idc
I think the whole deepdive thing isnt really explained well at all though because it’s really not made clear at all when to play anything
they added a story order recently in the handbook
I mean, they literally just changed that, although they still need to fine tune it like I said since a few are in the wrong place
it's a bit messy as they said above
the thing i was mainly curious about that i havent seen explained is the difference between the different tabs in story mode
like how are the spec ops things different from deepdives
longer
they're basically different kinds of old events
and then the 3rd tab as well
the crossover one is self explanatory tho i think
And breeding frenzy <a:KikuriSipSake:1150584940900122724> (which was disappointing)
Dreamscapes are entirely narrative (at least the ones I've played) and don't involve the Keeper
they're stories from other perspectives
thank you!
I hope they see it
ykw
they also dont properly explain the rewards cause it dont say you get posses from them until you actually do them
do the long ones give posses too?
yes im pretty sure they all do
pretty much every story chapter you do ends with getting a Posse, main or side
so it’s better to just do the 3-cost ones to get more posses
Unless there a specific one u need
i think you should do the posse of whichever character you're trying to run
like i did kathis and it's specific to her
same with vortice
I did Agrippa’s and I enjoyed the story but her posse lowk not very useful <:KikuriDrink:1064323484341260378>
still got that lovely dorm bg though <:AironaHeart:1427333169950101555>
only thing that matters fr
just play the game today, any advice?
check out cheris beginner handbook

You could look through and suggest smth. I might have missed out

I meant I guess this is what all server has same pacing time released like
You probably want a dmg amp wheel on her. Naut is.. just fine on her
I don't like it since it doesnt give more amp
also
if we are in Tulu alter banner( prediction) what other thing we will have with that banner
yes
Are the any ways to widen the hero box in "awakener" menu or maybe some other way to screenshot my full roster?
unfortunately no
Well, alright

So, i have a question regarding team building. Do i build my team around Arachne? I figured out she might be the carry as well as support at least until some later chapters. And in late game she does great with certain hero combinations, but i guess i dont have those yet
And regarding basic pulls, should i switch my focus on getting wheels or do i still pull for heroes? 🤔
u can try arachne horla murphy caecus for early game
blue is very strong early on
endgame requires at least 5 teams so its a good idea to collect different standards
but if u dont care about it u can just go for wheels
wait, why 5*teams 😭
wym why 4 teams
i said 5
wut
*reading*
so u learn how to budget ur units and dont jam ur strongest shit into a team
i think this system good tbh
"muh keybord"

Like, i have tendancy to min max my efforts 😅
So, if its actually more efficient to get more heroes i would pull for more heroes. Or is it actually doesn't matter regarding time and resources?
more units is better
at this stage
Alright, thx 🙏
so question, since final verdict scales off of dmg amp, does it scale with "base dmg" buffs?
no
so just dmg amp mainly, rip would've been pretty nice cuz helot wheel might've worked for her
cuz the scaling on realms sucks, I'd rather have permanent dmg amp than scale her realm for something a wheel and dmg amp focused cov could surpass
she converts RM into dmg amp
singularity stacks is increased by RM which boost the number in cards
it think its fine if u run pure ultra
mixed is eh though
umm
her E1 converts directly into more damage amp on her Exalt, so it doesn't care about what realm you're running
about convant stat
what kind of stat I should prior?
the RM to dmg amp convesion is less efficient than building pure dmg amp
its only good if u care about the other stuff RM brings
imo RM is good if u run pure ultra, but for mixed im still unsure
its in cheri's guide no?

well
given statements they made about encouraging players to play on PC I think their rates are better on Steam, but there's no way to know anything for sure
